name: Charter Hall Group
analysis: CHC has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 9% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.1× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$22.9000. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$23.2700, stop A$19.7307, target A$33.8879 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
